Name:
Lil Uzi Vert - Die Today
(prod. Cassius Jay & DJ Spinz)
(Today Was A Good Day)
Notes:
OG Filename: Uzi Cassius Spinz Die Today
Track by Lil Uzi Vert that was unofficially put onto streaming platforms without clearing by producer Cassius Jay. Originally released as "Die Today," then after being delisted, was reuploaded with the new name "Today Was A Good Day," and no credits to Lil Uzi Vert. Yeat later remixed the track over a reproduced instrumental.

Name:
Playboi Carti - I Got
(prod. Pi'erre Bourne)
(Tattoo, Double Tesla (YEAT REMIX))
Notes:
OG Filename: Playboi Carti- I Got
Recorded and first previewed by A$AP Bari on Snapchat in 2017, shortly after the release of Playboi Carti’s self-titled debut mixtape. The track was considered to be lost after it did not end up on his debut album, Die Lit, however, a high quality snippet of the song leaked on August 21, 2019, before leaking in full two days later. Yeat later recorded his own remix of the track on a re-produced version of the instrumental, titled "Double Tesla (YEAT REMIX)."

The original completed version of "ready" by Ken Carson and Destroy Lonely prior to adding an open verse for Yeat was previewed by Mia Owens in an Instagram Story on April 17, 2022 and by Ken Carson in an Instagram Story via the @user00xman account in 2022. It eventually leaked in full on August 4, 2023.

On July 28, Gwallahs confirmed on Discord that he would release the track on July 31, which he did on SoundCloud, under the title "Rïch off rap."

Name:

(prod. KP Beatz & Jonah Abraham)
(Getting Money, Guapo, King Tonka, im tha type)
Notes:
Possible OG Filename: pbc 4-6-22 3 KP IZZO
Uses the same instrumental as the 2022 Yeat Archive track "King Tonka." Contains vocals from DJ Swamp Izzo and an open verse. First teased by producer Jonah Abraham in a post on X on December 30, 2022. Lyrics teased by King Bob (@kingbob1629) on X (formerly Twitter) on January 2, 2024. Previewed by a third party crypto scammer ($CARTI on Solana) in a Telegram channel on June 12, 2024, who said the track would leak when the $CARTI coin reached $100,000. Leaked as a video on X (formerly Twitter) with Yeat's vocals from "King Tonka" edited over the open and extra leaker tags on June 15, 2024. The untagged version of the edit leaked as a bonus in a Playboi Carti groupbuy on March 1, 2026.

Notes: On July 5, 2024, BigBabyGucci took to X (formerly Twitter) to announce that he is dropping a song on July 12, July 26, and then an album on August 6, 2024. The nexy day, he posted "let’s hope yeat finish his verse in time   🤞🏿" indicating that a Yeat feature is intended for the album. On July 10, BigBabyGucci posted his DMs with Yeat from July 6 in an Instagram Story captioned "@yeat ⏰," where it showed Yeat giving his email and BBG asking for the features soon for his album, where he also mentions he "[sent] two over [that night]." However, Yeat did not end up getting back to him in time.
